notes: HAR-317 store-credit success-path capture creates a disposable customer, uses storeCreditAccountCredit with the customer id to create the store credit account, then replays account-id credit/debit mutations and downstream reads.

Cleanup debits the remaining captured balance back to zero and deletes the disposable customer. Store credit account identifiers may remain visible in Shopify audit/history even after balance neutralization.

userErrors.message: The currency provided does not match the currency of the store credit account
The expiry date must be in the future
A positive amount must be used to credit a store credit account
The store credit account does not have sufficient funds to satisfy the request

errors.message: Variable $customerId of type ID! was provided invalid value

problems.explanation: Expected value to not be null

errors.message: Variable $accountId of type ID! was provided invalid value

problems.explanation: Expected value to not be null
